title: Getting Started with cc-simplerouter — A Practical Guide for Backend Developers
description: Step-by-step guide to getting started with cc-simplerouter. Learn setup, configuration, and best practices for Backend.

sourceData.name: cc-simplerouter
sourceData.description: Install and setup in 26 seconds. Simplerouter configures Claude Code to use any compatible OpenRouter model in seconds, WITHOUT manual editing of config files, environment variables, or messing with local webservers/webUIs. It also doesn't overwrite your existing Claude Code subscription sign-in!

bodyHtml:
cc-simplerouter is making waves in the Backend ecosystem this week, gaining 90new stars. With a total of 90 stars on GitHub and 0 forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 90Stars
📈 +90/wkGrowth
🔀 0Forks
⚠️ 0Open Issues

Key Features

  • Written in Go for maximum performance
  • Licensed under NOASSERTION — free to use and modify

Why cc-simplerouter Is Trending

The Backend landscape is constantly evolving, and cc-simplerouter has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 90 new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Install and setup in 26 seconds. Simplerouter configures Claude Code to use any compatible OpenRouter model in seconds, WITHOUT manual editing of config files, environment variables, or messing with local webservers/webUIs. It also doesn't overwrite your existing Claude Code subscription sign-in!

If you're working in Backend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Practical Use Cases

Here are some common scenarios where cc-simplerouter shines:

  1. New projects: Start your next Go project with this tool as a foundation
  2. Migration: Consider switching if your current solution is slowing you down
  3. Learning: Study the source code to understand modern Backend patterns

Quick Start

Get started with cc-simplerouter in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://github.com/kdsuomi/cc-simplerouter # Navigate to project cd cc-simplerouter # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

cc-simplerouter is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
